subcodes.title: Letter to the fourth pillar (takbir)
subcodes.first_line: God is exalted above that which you magnify. God is greater than that which you glorify. God is more manifest than that which you have revealed [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتظهر المتسخر. الله اکبر عما انتم تکبرون الله اعظم عما انتم تعظمون الله اظهر عما انتم تظهرون
